title: "mapAgenticWorkItemMemoryBridge()"

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Maps WorkItem DATA into generic ScoreSignal and AgenticMemoryRecordProposal facts.

This helper is pure and mapper-only: it does not admit proposals, apply record
truth, mutate WorkItems, call providers, touch storage, or hydrate records.

## Import

```ts
import { mapAgenticWorkItemMemoryBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions";
```

## Signature

```ts
function mapAgenticWorkItemMemoryBridge(input: AgenticWorkItemMemoryBridgeInput<TInput, TRecord>): AgenticWorkItemMemoryBridgeResult<TRecord>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `input` | `AgenticWorkItemMemoryBridgeInput<TInput, TRecord>` | Current WorkItem projection, DATA policy, and optional bridge inputs. |

## Returns

Bridge result with generic outputs and bridge-local read models.

## Example

```ts
import { mapAgenticWorkItemMemoryBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/agentic-work-item-memory";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/solutions/agentic-work-item-memory/bridge.ts`
